titleStmt.title: SII 8.534: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 534. (A.R. No. 235 of 1903). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmate rāmāṉucāya namaḥ koval tivili Utaiya cālivākaṉa cakavaruṣam 1000 5 100 2 10 1- kku mel cellāniṉṟa vikāricamvaccarattil mitiṉanāyaṟṟil pūṟuvapakṣattil tecamiyum cukṟavāramum cuvātinakṣattiramum peṟṟa ṉāḷile Irācātirāca rācaparamespara śrīvirapiṟutāpa śrīviraveṅkaṭapatiteva mākārācayyaṉ Avarkaḷ peruṅkoṇṭai nakarattile reṟṉaciṅkātaṉāruṭarāyi
piṟutivīrācciyam paṇṇiaruḷāniṉṟa śrī Akilāṇṭakoṭi piṟamāṇṭaṉāyakarāṉa tiruvallikkeṇi teḷḷiyaciṅkapperumāḷukku śrīkāriyaturantararāṉa ceṉamutaliyārum koyiltāṉattārum Atikāri koppūri Oparācayyaṉ muttirai Etirācarum tirumayilāppūril Irukkum nakarattāril paṭṇacuvāmi periyantaikottiram ciṉṉaṉācciyaṇceṭṭi kumāraṉ cikki yār
tampi nācciyaṇaceṭṭiyārum kiṟāmapoliviṭṭu cilācātaṉampaṉṟi kuṭuttom paṇṇikkuṭutta viparam . ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattil vikkiramacoḻavaḷaṉāṭṭil cantirakirirācciyattil puḻalkoṭṭa ppaṟuṭai lāccipaṭṭu cirmaikkaḷ naṭuvupaṭṭu mmaccakkarayār cittirait tiruṉāḷ tirutter Opaiyatnukku maṇṭapattil Amutuceyiṟatukku ceykiṟa ti tavāri
opaiyattukkup paḻakkāppuThis inscription contains many abbreviations.piḷaṭṭalama I camparaṇi ṭṭa I neyi kku ṭṭa 3 cūṟāṉā Apiṣe kattukku kkāl vellavicai 1- I 1 pākku 3- kku ma I vācanakarattu ceyta puḷiyātarai talaikku 2 puḷi vīcai 1 paṇiyāram kku I tirukkoṭi yiṟaṅkaiyil paruppu
poṅkalukku Arici 1-2 kku ṭṭa payaṟu ṅa � pu 1 vella vīcai 1 I kku � 1 I neyi 2 kku puka teṅkāyi pu 2 paḻattu kku puu Appattukku Arici 3 pakku pu 1 vella vīcai 1 I kkueṇṇai 3 10 2- kku pu 1 I tocaikku Arici �kku pu 1 Uḷun tu 6 10 2 kku pu va2 10 4 Eṇṇai n=ta kku pukā2 10 4 rāmaṇi ku� I cantaṇam palam 10- kku pu 5 panta Eṇṇai ta ṅa kiḻakku ku � pākku � 1 paḻam �1va vāṇāttukku � 10 Aka tiṟttavārikku �9 10
vacanta tiruṉāḷukku ṉāḷ pu 1 kku piḷikku pulu cantaṇattukku pu 4 cāmpiṟāṇikku pu I ke pūrāvukku �kaḷja karikku �i makai pūvukku �1 paṉinir �1 Eṇṇaikku �- kku Uḷuntu � va kku 1va kku leṟṟilai �i koḻai ma3 10 I ḷa nirkku� I vāṇāttu pu 4 Ā ṉāḷ1- kku �3 10 4 Āka nāḷ 9- kku 3 10 tiruuvūral Eṇṇaikku poṉ 6 piḷikku pu 1 can=ta ṇam puḷain=ta
kempūrāvukku pu 2 va paṉinircempu Iraṇṭukku kālkiṟaiyam kalāri pu I cāmpiṟāṇi puka tirupāvaṭai ṟu kuḷaku paṭi vakai ṉū � ṉū 6 10 6 100- kku pu 2 10 5 paḻa-ṅ kaḷu 3- ku pu 6 I mākaṟkku pu 6 miḷaku pu va mpu I Uḷuntu pu 1 pākku veṟṟilai pu I nir pu I vāṇattuku pu 10 9 Ātiruvūṟakaḷapam 3 pu 6 I toppu tiruṇāḷukku ko5 100 pu 3 10 cūṭikuṭutta nācciyār tiruṇāḷukku
paḻakkāppu piḷi palam 5 tocai paṭi U pam tiruterukku pu va teppatiruṉāḷukku pu 5 10 ṭṭaṇa varukku pu 5 Āka Upaiyattukku Ayyarākamam tirutuḷā kku
Digital edition of SII 8.534 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
